caption: A man with glasses and brown hair, wearing a black t-shirt with a yellow logo that partially reads "Knu h" and a blue lanyard with an ID badge, stands in a room with neutral-colored walls. In the first sequence, he looks down at a small white object held in his hands. He then looks forward and brings his right hand up toward his chest. Next, he holds up a larger, rectangular white box with blue accents, gripping it with both hands. Finally, he lowers the box out of view and stands with his arms slightly raised, gesturing as he looks toward the camera. A black computer monitor is visible in the foreground at the bottom of the scene. The background remains static throughout the sequence, featuring a plain wall and a white rectangular screen area above the man.
